title: geum × intermedium
intro: Geum × intermedium is a hybrid plant species, commonly known as Avens or Wood Avens, which belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Geum × intermedium include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a useful natural remedy for various skin and gastrointestinal issues. Geum × intermedium can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused in oil for topical application, or used as a dried powder in capsules or tinctures.
